name: GOLFTEC Overland Park
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf training and club fitting venue focused on data-driven instruction and improvement. They utilize advanced systems like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized feedback and create custom game plans for golfers. The primary services include golf lessons, practice sessions using simulator technology, and expert club fittings, all aimed at accelerating improvement for players of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced motion-capture technology for precise swing analysis
Personalized improvement plans based on data-driven feedback
Professional club fitting with launch monitor data for optimization
Indoor simulator practice for skill development in any weather

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, but you can also bring your own equipment if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention a food or drink service, and BYOB policies are not specified. It is recommended to check with the location directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator time can vary, but standard 18-hole rounds typically take 1-2 hours depending on the software and player pace.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers instruction for juniors and youth programs, making it suitable for young golfers, though specific age requirements may vary by location.
